response_excerpt: CAVEAT: per-region OCI shape availability requires authed GetComputeCapacityReport. Compute Shapes Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Documentation All Pages Skip to main content Compute Shapes A shape is a template that determines the number of OCPUs , amount of memory, and other resources that are allocated to an instance. Compute shapes are available with AMD processors, Intel processors, and Arm-based processors. This topic provides basic information about the shapes that are available for bare metal instances, virtual machines (VMs), and dedicated virtual machine hosts. For infor
